items.title: Charlie Javice Faces Accusations Of Billing JPMorgan For Personal Expenses Amid $74M Legal Claim
items.description: Charlie Javice, a convicted startup founder, is facing allegations of billing JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) for personal expenses as part of a $74 million legal claim. What Happened: Javice, who was convicted for defrauding JPMorgan, is believed to have charged the bank for personal items such as cellulite butter and luxury hotel upgrades. The bank has already been billed over $142 million in legal fees for Javice and her co-executive Olivier Amar to fight federal fraud charges. JPMorgan is no

items.title: UBS Reaffirms Buy Rating on JPMorgan (JPM) as AI Drives Revenue Growth and Innovation
items.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) ranks among the best financial stocks to buy according to billionaire Ken Fisher. Following an investor meeting with the bank’s Chief Data & Analytics Officer, UBS reaffirmed its Buy rating and $357 price target for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) on November 12. items.title: Trump's Bond Buying Spree Surges Past $82 Million Since August
items.description: Trump bought over $82 million in bonds, intersecting with sectors boosted by his policies. Disclosures show 175+ transactions.
